notes: This is a Phase 8 planning inventory only.
No source listed here is approved for retrieval until it is snapshotted, hashed, reviewed, chunked, and approved.
Official voter guide materials, arguments, rebuttals, and fiscal analyses must be reviewed before public display.
Initial narrowed target set: Proposition 1 as primary, Proposition 45 as secondary.

measures.working_title: The Veterans and Affordable Housing Bond Act of 2026
measures.source_label: SB 417 (Limón) The Veterans and Affordable Housing Bond Act of 2026
measures.review_note: Primary Phase 8 target. Strong housing-affordability fit and relatively clean bond-measure framing; wait for official voter guide text, title/summary, analysis, and arguments before ingestion.

measures.source_label: ACA 20 (Gabriel) Save for California's Future Act
measures.review_note: Needs official voter guide materials and issue-lens fit assessment.

measures.working_title: Extends Existing Tax on High Incomes for Schools and Healthcare
measures.review_note: Strong public education lens fit, but keep as backup rather than first target to avoid expanding the initial release-candidate scope too quickly.

measures.source_label: SB 42 (Umberg) Political Reform Act of 1974: public campaign financing
measures.review_note: Important governance topic but outside current issue-lens set.

measures.source_label: SCA 1 (Newman) Elections: recall of state officers

measures.working_title: Middle-Class Homeownership and Family Home Construction Act of 2026
measures.review_note: Strong housing lens fit, but Proposition 1 is the cleaner first housing target. Keep this as a backup if source coverage is better than Proposition 1.
Health/research topic is outside current issue-lens set.

measures.working_title: Additional Voter Identification and Citizenship Verification Requirements
measures.review_note: Potential public-safety/election-administration relevance, but high risk of political inference; defer unless source framing is very clear.

measures.working_title: One-Time Tax on Certain Individuals and Trusts
measures.review_note: Possible education funding connection; keep as backup because tax framing needs careful attribution and voter guide materials.

measures.working_title: Audits of Programs Funded by New State Special Taxes
measures.review_note: Governance/tax oversight topic outside current issue-lens set.

measures.working_title: Prohibits New State Personal Property Taxes and Certain Retroactive State Taxes
measures.review_note: Tax policy topic outside current issue-lens set.
Possible local funding relevance, but issue-lens fit needs official analysis before inclusion.

measures.working_title: Clinic Funding Accountability and Transparency Act
measures.review_note: Health clinic topic outside current issue-lens set.
Secondary Phase 8 target. Strong climate/environment and housing-adjacent fit; likely a good candidate after voter guide materials are available.
